join_order.notes: Build bool/bitset array green_part[2000001] indexed by p_partkey. Probe with l_partkey per lineitem row — O(1), branch prediction friendly. ~5.5% selectivity yields ~3.3M surviving lineitem rows.
Precompute suppkey_to_nationrow[100001] as int8_t (or int32_t) array: for each supplier row, store nationkey. Load supplier_by_suppkey dense index + s_nationkey at startup. O(1) per probe.
Fold into suppkey_to_nationrow precomputation. 25-row nation table loaded entirely at startup. No per-row lookup needed during hot path — nationrow is already stored in precomputed array.
Use orders_by_orderkey dense array (240 MB, mmap). O(1): orow = orders_by_orderkey[l_orderkey]; year = extract_year(o_orderdate[orow]). 7 distinct years (1992–1998).

Use pre-built partsupp_hash_index (open-addressing, 16.7M slots, 256 MB, load 0.477). Composite key = partkey * 200001ULL + suppkey. Fibonacci hash (FIB_CONST = 11400714819323198485ULL, LOG2_CAP = 24). mmap the file; lookup is O(1) avg. Only called for ~3.3M green-filtered rows.

data_structures.green_part_filter: flat bool array, size 2000001, indexed by p_partkey — fits in L3 cache (2 MB)
data_structures.suppkey_to_nationrow: flat int32_t array, size 100001, precomputed at startup (~400 KB, hot in cache)
data_structures.nation_names: char[25][26] loaded at startup (650 bytes, always cached)
data_structures.orders_lookup: mmap dense int32_t array orders_by_orderkey[60000001] (240 MB) + o_orderdate column (60 MB)
data_structures.partsupp_lookup: mmap partsupp_hash_index HTSlot[16777216] (256 MB) + ps_supplycost column (61 MB)
data_structures.aggregation: double profits[64][25][10] — per-thread 2D array (nation × year_offset), zero-initialized; reduced after parallel phase

startup_sequence: mmap lineitem columns: l_partkey, l_suppkey, l_orderkey, l_extendedprice, l_discount, l_quantity
load part/p_partkey.bin + part/p_name.bin into memory; build green_part bool[2000001]
hot_path_per_lineitem_row: int32_t orow = orders_by_orderkey[l_orderkey[i]]; int year = extract_year(o_orderdate[orow]);

parallelism.parallel_phase: lineitem scan (60M rows split into ~600 morsels across 64 threads)
parallelism.reduction: single-threaded sum of per-thread profits[25][10] arrays after join phase

indexes.purpose: O(1) filter of lineitem rows by l_partkey — replaces hash probe
O(1) lineitem l_suppkey → nation row, precomputed to eliminate two-level indirection
O(1) l_orderkey → orders row for o_orderdate extraction

aggregation_detail.finalize: iterate 25×10, skip zero-sum groups, collect (n_name, year, sum) tuples

memory_budget.hot_structures: ~2.5 MB (green_part + suppkey_to_nationrow + nation data — fits in L3)
